『女性も時には、積極的に動くべし！<br>猛アタックで意中の彼を落とせ！！』か…:
'Women should also take the initiative! Win your man with a fierce
assault!' Hmm...
むぅ……この恋愛雑誌は、特に難しいことが書かれているな。<br>戦闘で切りかかる:
Hmm... This romance mag's advice is really tough. I'm good at
charging in combat, but with my crush... Wh-what should I do...
あ……兄さん……いや、特に何もしては……<br>ただ、本を読んでいただけで……あ:
Ah... Brother... No, I wasn't doing anything... I was just reading a
book... Ah, ah... Goodbye...
――に、兄さん！ 待ってくれ！ その、ア、アア、アタシは……<br>に、兄さんの:
B-Brother! Wait! Um, a-ahh, I... I... it's about you, Brother—! It's
about you...!
えぇぇ！？ なんで逃げるんだ、兄さーーん！？ 凄い剣幕だから<br>切りかかって:
Ehhh!? Why are you running, Brother!? You looked so fierce, I
thought you'd attack! I-It's a misunderstanding! Wait for me!
